title: Implement dependency constraint hardening in pyproject.toml and requirements.txt
description: Apply upstream dependency constraint updates in Plexus to reduce resolver search space while keeping intended functionality; verify with fresh Python 3.11 pip dry-run.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Started implementation. Investigating high-churn/broad dependency ranges (fastmcp, kaleido, datasets, test tooling) and direct version conflicts (e.g., tiktoken vs pydantic-ai openai extras) before patching pyproject and requirements.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Applied dependency hardening in pyproject.toml + requirements.txt: tiktoken raised to >=0.12,<1.0; fastmcp bounded to >=3.1,<3.2; kaleido pinned to 0.2.1; datasets/gensim/watchtower/pyairtable constrained to tested ranges. Validation: conda run -n py311-dev python -m pip install -e . --dry-run now resolves successfully (exit 0) without resolver depth failure.
